ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Dec-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chaune Williams (Counsel for Nydia Diaz, Personal Representative).

Although the tentative ruling was to continue the matter to December 5, 2006 (requiring the beneficiaries to appear on that date as well), Ms. Williams appeared to contest that ruling. After presentation by Ms. Williams, the Court requested that Ms. Williams submit a proposed Order with monetary amounts left blank for review by the Court. In addition, the beneficaries need not appear at the hearing date continued to December 5, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR# 5802; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Matter is continued to 11/7. Appearance may not be required on 11/7. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
